Exhibition Room

Many Flowers

A wide-ranging gathering of the garden's blooms — lupine and delphinium, lilies and foxgloves, fritillaries and lilac — each canvas a different corner of the season.

No. 15-1
Blue Delphinium
Nona Dronova · 2023 · Oil on canvas

Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas

Nona Dronova · 2023 · Oil on canvas

The Garden as Art

A digital archive of artistic heritage, dedicated to the philosophy of the garden, contemporary art, and the creation of a harmonious living space.
